projectDescription: An interactive educational web experience showcasing 10 endangered Thai marine animals through low-poly art, parallax scrolling animations, and conservation information.
keyFeatures: Low-poly polygon shard art system for marine animal visualization
Parallax scrolling underwater experience with Framer Motion
Detailed conservation information for 10 endangered Thai marine species
Animated animal assembly/disassembly in the detail page
Interactive stage navigation with intro animations
Ambient underwater sound with background audio controller
Horizontal scroll parallax storytelling on the Polygon page
Responsive design supporting mobile and desktop
Depth indicator showing simulated ocean depth while scrolling
publicApiSurface: ANIMALS array in src/data/animalConfig.js — defines polygon shards for each animal
animalDetails.json in src/data/ — stores conservation content (intro, threat, solution) per animal
AnimalInfoBox component — displays animal info overlaid on parallax sections
PreviewStage component — animal preview in selection stages
AnimalCard component — card display for animal listing
